title: Digital Magnetic Stirrer w/Timer, 100fl.oz Magnetic Stir Plate, Magnetic Mixer w/LCD Display, Lab Stirrer w/Stir Bar (NO Heating)
description:
USEFUL TIMER - Up to 48 hours of timer settings, easy to operate and easy to use. Of course, this magnetic stirrer also supports a non-timing mode.
DIGITAL CONTROL - Adjustable speed range from 250 to 2000 RPM. It supports fine and coarse adjustment with an accuracy of 1 RPM, making it easy to adjust the low speed of our stir plate, which is not possible with other models.
LARGE STIRRING CAPACITY - The whole magnetic mixer is light in weight, but it is sturdy and reliable enough to reach a maximum mixing capacity of 100fl.oz.
PERFECT BODY DESIGN - Our lab stirrers have large and clear dials that are easy to read and understand. The round working surface makes it easier to center the vessel, and it's large enough to accommodate various sizes.
WIDE RANGE OF USES - It can be used in scenarios such as home brewing, research institutions, environmental industries, chemical experiments, health care, and university experiments. For example, this magnetic stir plate is a good choice for a yeast starter project.
reviews_5s:
The ANZESER Digital Magnetic Stirrer with Timer is a phenomenal tool for anyone in need of precise and efficient liquid mixing. Whether you’re working in a professional laboratory, conducting home experiments, or crafting specialized solutions, this magnetic stir plate delivers unmatched performance and convenience. Its thoughtful design, robust features, and user-friendly interface make it an indispensable addition to any workspace.

Design and Build – Compact and Durable:
The ANZESER stirrer’s design strikes the perfect balance between functionality and elegance. Its compact size saves valuable bench space, while the durable materials ensure it can handle the rigors of daily use.

The LCD display is bright, clear, and easy to read, making it simple to monitor speed, time, and other parameters at a glance. The sturdy magnetic plate provides consistent and stable mixing, even at higher speeds or with larger volumes, ensuring reliability in every application.

Performance – Powerful and Versatile:
With a capacity of 100 fl. oz., this magnetic stirrer can handle everything from small-scale experiments to larger-volume preparations. The motor provides a wide range of stirring speeds, allowing for gentle mixing or vigorous agitation depending on your needs.

The digital timer is an excellent feature, enabling precise control over mixing durations. Whether you’re conducting timed experiments or leaving the stirrer unattended, the timer ensures consistent results without the need for constant supervision.

Ease of Use – Intuitive Controls:
Operating the ANZESER stirrer is a breeze. The intuitive interface allows you to set and adjust speed and time effortlessly. The clear layout ensures that even first-time users can operate it with confidence.

The magnetic coupling system is robust and reliable, ensuring that the stir bar stays in place during mixing. Changing settings is seamless, allowing for quick adjustments as needed.

Applications – Ideal for a Variety of Uses:
This magnetic stirrer is perfect for a wide range of applications, including:

Laboratory Use: Ideal for mixing chemical solutions, buffers, or culture media.
DIY Projects: Perfect for hobbyists crafting cosmetics, soaps, or other solutions.
Culinary Use: Can assist in creating emulsions or mixing delicate liquids in culinary experiments.
Educational Settings: A fantastic tool for teaching students the fundamentals of mixing and reaction dynamics.
The versatility of this stirrer makes it a valuable asset for both professional and personal use.

Advanced Features – A Step Above Competitors:
Digital Timer: The built-in timer offers precision and peace of mind, ensuring consistency in every experiment or preparation.
LCD Display: Provides real-time feedback on speed and time, enhancing control and reducing errors.
Magnetic Stability: The powerful magnetic coupling ensures smooth and consistent stirring, even with thicker solutions or larger volumes.
Quiet Operation: Despite its power, the stirrer operates with minimal noise, maintaining a peaceful work environment.
Durability and Maintenance – Built to Last:
The ANZESER stirrer is built with high-quality materials designed to withstand frequent use in demanding environments. Its smooth surface is easy to clean, and the magnetic plate resists wear, maintaining performance over time. This low-maintenance design is perfect for busy labs or workspaces.

Value – Exceptional Performance at a Reasonable Price:
The ANZESER Digital Magnetic Stirrer offers incredible value. Its professional-grade features and reliable performance far exceed what you’d expect at this price point. It’s a cost-effective solution for anyone who needs consistent, high-quality mixing capabilities.

Why Choose the ANZESER Magnetic Stirrer?
Precision: The combination of digital controls and a timer ensures exact results every time.
Ease of Use: Its intuitive design makes it accessible for professionals and beginners alike.
Versatility: Handles a wide range of volumes and applications effortlessly.
Durability: Built to last, even under heavy use.
Conclusion:
The ANZESER Digital Magnetic Stirrer with Timer is a game-changer for anyone requiring reliable and precise liquid mixing. Its powerful performance, ease of use, and thoughtful features make it an outstanding choice for laboratories, DIY enthusiasts, and educators.

Whether you’re conducting cutting-edge research, experimenting with new recipes, or teaching the next generation of scientists, this magnetic stirrer is up to the task. I highly recommend it for anyone seeking a high-quality, versatile, and dependable stirring solution.Bought this to make colloidal silver at home. It's perfect, and the ease of use is a plus. Get it!Play Video
I love 99% of this magnetic 🧲 stirrer.
No need to read the instructions, I figured it out in less than a minute.
My last stirrer was an old school one, literally I used the same one in high school 30 years ago. They were built to last and it did but, it only had a knob that turned it on and adjusted the speed.
The problem with that style is you have no idea what the RPM's are and if you wanted or needed to stir your _____ then you would need to have a timer handy.
For less than the cost of many of the "Who knows what the RPM'S are" type of stirrer, you can get one of these beaties. Not only can you set the RPM's ( you actually have to,lol) but you can change them while it's on stirring.
By far the biggest selling point for me was the timer. Making 30/70 vape juice, 150ml once or twice a week for the past month or so and there has been no change in how well it works.
With me being me, I had to make sure that it would meet my needs the first thing I did was fill a 1 quart measuring glass all the way up to the 1000ml mark with straight VG (vegetable glycerin), of found my largest stir stick and set it to the max amount of time 2880 min AKA 2 days & set the speed to 2000 RPM's and let it do it's thing.
Ten min shy of two days later and the constant 2000 RPM'S warmed the VG up enough that it was in full whirlpool mode, all the way to the bottom.
That told me all I needed to know.
Know I don't have to worry about forgetting to set a timer or falling asleep, only to awake to a 150 ml flask of vape juice that's reached over 95° F for hours on end, making it unusable.
Anyways it gets my seal of approval, not that it means anything to you, so if you buy one and are disappointed by it and my review, I'll make the wager that if you're not happy & can figure out where I live, you can come by anytime and give me a good swift kick in the buns, sound fair to you? LOL, I promise you'll like it, of course there's bound to be a lemon or two sooner or later (Google Yugo if you would like to see a company that made more lemons than possibly anyone else) or when someone leaves a 1* review because it was damaged during shipping or something like that.
Ignore all the haters, cuz hatrers are gonna hate and enjoy whatever it is you will be concocting with your new stirrer.
Don't try mixing at that speed (in last pic with my hand holding onto it, that's because if I wasn't, the speed will push the flask very close to the edge, too scary for me to find out after the near spillage before.
Also in the one pic you can see my juice is clear with a yellow tint and then in the next one it's completely opaque due to the billions on micro bubbles.This magnetic stirrer works great. I got it for $28 and that beats pretty much everything else available, plus it comes with LCD display and precise RPM speed sets. Can't ask for more. Well I guess if I could ask for more, it would be for the RPM to be live adjustable when its running. As it is now you have to click on RPM then spin dial to get to the RPM you want to try next, then click again. Seems it would be easier if that were just live adjustment. No big deal though. Another positive, I love the way it ramps up and down in speed.Bought this to make bulk liquid culture where sterility is important. Set for 5 minutes and adjustable speed for your needs. Has worked like a charm and is still going strong!Functions as described. Easy intuitive controls. Great product! I use it with a 3000ml flask for homebrew yeast starters.Love this magnetic stirrer, the lcd screen timer feature all work great, I've used it about 4 times now with about 30 min run each time with thick transdermal lipid base cream - honestly seeing the bad review prompted me to write my experience with thicker substances, to potentially help others looking for something affordable that can to the job. I bought this one after returning another one i bought from Amazon, soley because of the review mentioning they use it to mix icing. So my experience is - Something as thick as a very thick plo gel - it wont be able to mix it, and will wiggle and wobble - but with something thats a little thinner like the lipid base i use. It works fine with a few caveats, you have to start at lowest speed and go up gradualy. You going to want to keep your hand on the beacker, (im using a 50ml beacker) its barely larger than the stirring rod. So with the thickness it tends to spin the entire beacker too... I was however able, if you center it perfectly, to get it to stay put but only at around 600rpm. If you gradually increase the speed and hold it, im able to go to 2000rpm. If you dont do that though it will wobble and vibrate like the guy in the 1 star review mentions...The lcd works great if you dont want to painfully turn the dial for ever to go up in speed (it turns 1 unit at a time?!) I suggest to hefty flicks and apposed to turning it "politely". I will try and post a video next time i use it to make more sence. The only thing left to make this amazing little stirrer to be punching way above its price range (~$35) - Is how long will it last?Useful control and readouts. Easy to repeat operations at fixed speed and duration. Instrumentation is a valuable plus versus guesswork stirrers. Quiet, which may be important to those in a quiet workspace [unlike the toprated joanlab compact stirrer, with noise you can’t miss]. Digital speed power supply reaches specified speed smoothly then locks pretty much rock solid, unless liquid is not uniform, in which case it indicates what it is happening. Power supply delivers extra torque as needed to achieve speed promptly. Compelling value (while $18 discount is offered), but also worth the full price, in my view. This is an inexpensive plastic case stirrer and does not directly compare to full-size metal lab models, except that it does the same thing competently for less money.I bought this to stir my royal icing and hopefully make it have less bubble. So far it has been pretty good! You have to use the little magnetic pill shaped thing.

The awesome thing about it is that you can use a really high speed. Works great for me.A very sleek and affordable lab-grade digital magnetic stirrer.
reviews_1s: Stirrer was great while it lasted. The knob took some getting used to, but the stirrer itself was very effective with good control over the speed and duration. However, after about 6 months of light use, my stirrer is no longer powering on. I will update this review if the problem is resolvedThis won’t stir resin, unless perhaps it’s a very thin one. All it does is wiggle and float around. No spinning action.Magneet pennetje draait niet rond op z'n plek, mixt dus niks maar schiet alle kanten op door de kan met vloeistof. De vloeistof was niet te dik, de inhoud slechts een liter en de kan is vaker gebruikt voor magnetisch mixen maar vanaf het eerste moment was het bagger. Werkt gewoon niet. Terugsturen had ik geen zin in, dus dan maar openmaken. De draaimagneet aan de motor as iets meer naar de bodemplaat verschoven voor meer contact. Het mocht niet baten. Adapter bewaardm, komt altijd van pas, de 'magnetic stirrer' ging daarna de afvalbak in.It was dead on arrivalJ'ai reçu seulement l'agitateur magnétique mais pas la petite barre magnétique. De plus il y a pas de notice en français, colis très peu protéger. Je vous le déconseille.Das Kabel ging kaputt電源入れるたび数値がリセットされるのでたいへんですね。Non ha avuto il tempo per sapere cosa mi piace e cosa non mi piaci perché non accendi più non funziona dopo 5 minuti vado adesso
